\tzpentry{ID5845}{Gravitomagnetic Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5845 introduces Gravitomagnetic Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{B}_{gravitomagnetic} = \frac{2G}{c^2} \frac{\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r}}{r^3} \int_V \rho(\mathbf{r}') |\mathbf{r}'|^2 d^3r' \end{equation}
